MessageTypes.label: EGT
MessageTypes.description: EGT for each cylinder, separated by |, or just a single EGT if that's all that's available

MessageTypes.label: CHT
MessageTypes.description: CHT for each cylinder, separated by |, or just a single EGT if that's all that's available

MessageTypes.label: TIT 1
MessageTypes.description: Turbine Inlet Temperature #1 (if plane has it)

MessageTypes.label: TIT 2
MessageTypes.description: Turbine Inlet Temperature #2 (if plane has it)

MessageTypes.label: Waypoint Distance
MessageTypes.description: Distance to next Waypoint, nautical miles

MessageTypes.label: Fuel Flow
MessageTypes.description: Fuel Flow in Gallons per Hour

MessageTypes.label: MPG
MessageTypes.description: GPS Ground Speed in Knots / Fuel Flow in Gallons per Hour

MessageTypes.label: Plane Profile #
MessageTypes.description: Plane Profile #. 0: A2A Comanche, 1: Cessna T206H, 2: Generic C172

MessageTypes.label: Show Normalized Mode
MessageTypes.description: 0: Standard mode for EGT, 1: Normalized Mode for EGT

MessageTypes.label: Step Button State
MessageTypes.description: 1 for button down, 0 for button released. Use a MF variable in the input

MessageTypes.label: LF Button State
MessageTypes.description: 1 for button down, 0 for button released. Use a MF variable in the input
